prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约8649→13481→8537→9763→10670，2022年因专业组调整出现较大波动后，近三年位次在8500–10700区间波动，2025年基准约10670名 ，整体呈小幅后移趋势；本省物理类计划2021年2933人，2022–2025年分别为2441、2361、2474、2479人；2026年计划2574人，较2025年扩招约95人（+3. 8%），扩招幅度温和，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科2026年主榜排名第13位（Top20），近年排名稳定在11–13名区间，综合 实力稳居国内第一方阵；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端相关舆情（论文数据存疑等），但抖音热度排名第29位（较热），短视频平台曝光量较高；2022–2023年曾出现省外断档记录，2025年声誉评价转为偏正面，整体舆情对省内报考影响有限；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共23个，其中生态学A+、工商管理A+ 、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、基础医学A、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科覆盖面广，医学、理学、经管均具较强竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息/通信、临床医学、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，与中大优势学科高度匹配；本省物理类考生2026年约45.6万人，较2025年增加约3.6%，竞争基数扩大，近年保持平稳；中山大学位于广东省广州市，为本省唯一985综合性大学，省内招生占比极高（2021–2025年物理类计划占比约60–70%），本 省考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10670名、2026年扩招3.8%及本省物理类考生增加3.6%三因素，扩招与考生增加大致对冲，但声誉偏 负面及专业热度分化使竞争略有加剧；预测2026年物理类最低位次约10930名，区间10430–11430名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8649 → 13481 → 8537 → 9763 → 10670. In 2022, due to adjustments in major groups, there was a significant fluctuation. In the past three years, the ranking fluctuated within the range of 8500–10700, with a baseline of about 10670 in 2025, showing a slight backward trend overall. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 2933 in 2021, and from 2022 to 2025 it was 2441, 2361, 2474, and 2479 respectively. The 2026 plan is 2574, an increase of about 95 students (+3.8%) compared to 2025. The expansion is moderate and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it ranks 13th (Top 20), and in recent years it has stabilized within the 11–13 range, with comprehensive strength firmly in the first tier domestically. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct-related public opinion (e.g., questionable paper data), but its Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms. From 2022 to 2023, there were records of enrollment gaps outside the province. In 2025, the reputation evaluation turned somewhat positive, and overall public opinion has limited impact on provincial applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Basic Medicine A, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc. The discipline coverage is broad, and medicine, science, and economics/management all have strong competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Clinical Medicine, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely matching SYSU's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the number of provincial Physics Category examinees is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, with a growing competitive base that has remained stable in recent years. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, and is the only 985 comprehensive university in the province. Its provincial enrollment proportion is extremely high (from 2021 to 2025, the Physics Category enrollment plan accounted for about 60–70%), and provincial examinees have a strong willingness to apply, with significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the 2025 baseline ranking of 10670, the 3.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the 3.6% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, the expansion and examinee increase roughly offset each other. However, the somewhat negative reputation and differentiation in major popularity slightly intensify competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 10930, with a range of 10430–11430.

- Artificial Intelligence.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Materials Science
- Geographical Sciences
- Ecology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10430–11430, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 10430), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors such as Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 11430), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors like Mathematics and Electronic Information, which balance academic strength and employment prospects, and use Tier 3 majors such as Ecology (A+) as a stable choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1453 → 1504 → 1707 → 1494 → 1682, fluctuating narrowly within the 1450–1710 range. The 2025 baseline is about 1682, with no clear upward or downward trend over the past five years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 654 in 2021, and 581, 580, 589, and 591 from 2022 to 2025 respectively. The 2026 plan is 513, a significant reduction of 78 students (-13.2%) compared to 2025, indicating a notable contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 13th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct-related public opinion, but Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with overall high exposure. The 2025 reputation evaluation had turned somewhat positive, with limited impact on provincial applications. Advantageous disciplines in History Category include Chinese Language and Literature (A), Philosophy (A-), Foreign Languages and Literature (A-), Law (A-), Sociology (A-), Business Administration (A+), Applied Economics (A-), etc., with strong humanities and social sciences strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are recommended as hot; Teacher Training/Education is to be observed with caution; Finance/Economics is to be observed with caution. The number of provincial History Category examinees in 2026 is about 326,200, a significant increase of approximately 11.6% compared to 2025, with a growing trend in recent years. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, and is the only 985 comprehensive university in the province, with a very high proportion of provincial History Category enrollment, leading to strong application willingness among local examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1682, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 13.2%, and the 11.6% increase in provincial History Category examinees, the dual superposition of enrollment reduction and examinee surge significantly intensifies competition, and the ranking is expected to move forward (numerical decrease). The predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 1579, with a range of 1390–1768.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1390–1768, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings better than the lower limit (within 1390), prioritize Tier 1 majors such as Economics (Guangzhou) and Law. For rankings near the upper limit (around 1768), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors like Business Administration (A+ discipline) and History, and use Tier 3 foreign language majors as a stable option.
